title.en: But the rotten aura on Gu Heyuanzu's body prove...

content.en:
"Lifespan!"

Ye Tian felt the limit of life from Gu Heyuanzu, he had not seen anyone facing the limit of life for a long, long time, even if many lives were not cultivated, but they could live for infinite years, theoretically there was no limit to life, at most, after spending endless years, the will could not hold on, and would fall into silence, and eventually the will would be extinguished, and then fall and die, but that was not the limit of life.

But the rotten aura on Gu Heyuanzu's body proved that his lifespan was short.

A half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse in the Eight Extremes Realm, but he would still face a lifespan, Ye Tian felt incredible.

Although he had heard before that the half-step Eternal Realm in the space-time territory would have a lifespan, he had never seen it after all, and this time he saw it with his own eyes, so he was a little shocked.

The half-step Eternal Realm can live for 10 million eternal years, but Gu Heyuanzu is about to face the life limit, which shows that he is almost about to live 10 million eternal years, what a long time this is!

In the Source Sea, there is not necessarily a half-step Eternal Realm that lives for such a long time, because many half-step Eternal Realms will inevitably break into various treasure forbidden lands in order to survive, and even fight with other half-step Eternal Realms, maybe they will fall one time.

Therefore, although the half-step Eternal Realm in the Source Sea has an infinite lifespan, there are not many half-step Eternal Realms that can really live to more than 10 million years.

Therefore, many half-step Eternal Realms in the space-time territory actually don't care too much about lifespan.

Like Gu He Yuanzu's side, it is really extremely rare to live to the limit of lifespan.

"I've seen all the Origin Ancestors!"

Gu He Yuanzu smiled.

"I've seen Gu He Yuanzu!"

"I've seen Gu He Yuanzu!"

"I've seen Gu He Yuanzu!"

Many Eight Extremes Realms respected Gu He's Ancestor more, because he had really lived for too long, and many Eternal Realms were not as old as him.

has lived for a long time, which means that Gu Heyuanzu has seen a lot and knows a lot of secrets.

Moreover, Gu Heyuanzu's strength is also very strong, reaching the extreme of the Eight Extremes Realm, touching the second boundary barrier, and among the powerhouses who have touched the second boundary barrier, they all belong to the top existences.

It's a pity that he still hasn't stepped into the Nine Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm, nor has he stepped into the Eternal Realm.

"Gu He Yuanzu, what did you do when you summoned us this time~?"

An Eight Extremes Realm asked.

Gu Heyuan Ancestor said: "You should all know that I don't have much life, I have been too cautious in this life, resulting in missing many opportunities, and now I still want to impact the Eternal Realm, but in my current state, there is no hope of relying on myself to impact the Eternal Realm, so I want to go to a place, where there is hope for me to be promoted to the Eternal Realm, but it is very dangerous, and entering there with my strength alone is looking for death, so I want to invite some Eight Extremes Realm to enter that place with me." "

"What is it?"

Many of the Eight Extremes Realms are interested.

Although it must be very dangerous there, if Gu Heyuan Ancestor can hope to be promoted to the Eternal Realm, then there is also hope that they will be promoted to the Eternal Realm. Although they are said to be the Eight Extremes Realm, their combat power is comparable to that of the weaker Eternal Realm, but after all, they are not the real Eternal Realm! It is simply too difficult for the Eight Extremes Realm to hit the Eternal Realm, and it is even more difficult to become the Nine Extremes Realm.

So, they have to seize every opportunity.

"It's the land of the abyss!"

Gu He Yuanzu revealed.

The Abyssal Land.

A few of the Eight Extremes Realm were shocked when they heard this name.

"Gu He Yuan Ancestor, do you know where the Abyssal Land is?" True Yang Saint Ancestor was shocked.

Another Eight Extremes Realm said: "Gu He Yuan Ancestor, 90,000 years ago, I consulted you and asked you about the Abyssless Land, but you said I didn't know. "

Gu He Yuanzu smiled and said, "I didn't want to enter the Abyss Land before, and I haven't made up my mind yet, why do I want to tell you? Some of you have clones, but I don't!"

Gu He Yuanzu has no doppelganger, which is also the reason why Gu He Yuanzu has never dared to take risks.

In fact, many of the Eight Extremes Realm existences have clones, but the clones are different, some clones have low strength, and it is difficult to have the same combat power as the main body, and some clones Once they fall, they will pay a great price if they want to recondense them.

But Gu Heyuanzu didn't even have the qualifications to have a clone, it wasn't that he didn't want to have a clone, but the path of cultivation was special, and he couldn't have a clone.

It's like the heart of the primordial tree, after the other half-step Eternal Realm is refined, a clone can be formed, but Gu He Yuanzu is useless, he cultivates the only sword path, and it is a very powerful sword path in the space-time territory, but this kind of cultivation system cannot divide the will and divide the power, even if the materials that can refine the doppelganger will be shattered by the power of the only sword path, so it cannot form a clone.

Gu Heyuanzu's path has been completed, so there is no way to change the path again, so he can only keep going like this.

So.

Some eighth-level realms with clones dared to break into the abyssless land, but he didn't dare to break because he only had one life.

It's just that the other Eight Extremes Realm didn't know the location of the Abyssless Land, but Gu He Yuanzu knew.

"What is the Abyssal Land?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Not only did Ye Tian not know, but many Eight Extremes Realms didn't know much about the Abyssal Land.

Gu He Yuanzu wanted to go with the other Eight Extremes Realm, so he introduced: " The Abyssal Land is actually a lair of the Void Beast, and it is a movable nest, about 6 million years ago, many Eternal Realms in the space-time territory besieged the Void Beast, and the Abyss Land was also affected, that battle made the Void Beast almost disappear in the space-time territory area, and also caused a lot of losses to the space-time territory, and several Immortal Realm lords fell, and the number of ordinary Eternal Realm powerhouses fell even more, and even many space-time territories were destroyed. And the Abyssal Land was told by those Eternal Realms who participated in the war that it had been annihilated, but in fact it was not annihilated. The Abyssal Land seemed to have its own consciousness, and after that battle, the Abyss Land was severely damaged and escaped into the depths of the Void Zone. The Immortal Realm Lords were not interested in the Abyssal Land, so they would not look for it, while the ordinary Eternal Realm did not dare to enter the depths of the Void Realm, fearing that they would be lost. And the reason why I know the location of the Abyssal Land is that 3 million years ago, I offended an Eternal Realm and was forced to flee into the depths of the Void Zone, and accidentally found the Abyss Land, but I didn't dare to enter it, so I only left traces and waited for the future to enter again. 2.8 million years ago, the Eternal Realm I offended fell, and I dared to appear again. If any of you want to go to the Abyssless Land, you must conclude a space-time contract with me, although it may not be able to bind you, but I hope that after you enter the Abyssal Land, at least you will not hurt each other. If you don't make a space-time contract, I won't take you there. "

"I'm willing to go!"

"I'm willing to go!"

A famous Eight Extremes Realm wants to enter the Abyssless Land.

Ye Tian was also willing to enter the Abyssless Land, so he agreed to conclude a space-time contract, which was just an alliance contract, which had no impact on the Eight Extremes Realm, and everyone didn't care.

However, there are also some Eight Extremes Realm who dare not enter the Abyssless Land, and these Eight Extremes Realm who dare not enter the Abyss Land basically belong to the Doppelganger, so they dare not take risks, after all, they only have one life.

In addition, there are still many Eight Extremes Realm who have not come here, maybe they are in a certain space-time territory or even a source sea retreat.

After all, many of the Eight Extremes Realm that had touched the Second Boundary Barrier would enter the Source Sea and impact the Nine Extremes Realm.

For example, Gu He Yuanzu has also been in Yuanhai for a long time, but he has never broken through, so he gave up becoming the Nine Extremes Realm.

In the end, there were 376 Eight Extremes Realm who were willing to enter the Abyssless Land.

And the time to enter the Abyssal Land is now!

Gu He Yuanzu didn't want the news to leak out, causing the Eternal Realm Lord of the Immortal Realm to come to him and let him lead the way, so that the final benefit would not be his turn.

Therefore, he would not waste time, and immediately took these Eight Extremes Realm to the depths of the Void Region. _
